title: Please Don’t Open a Restaurant
description: Kid-3 proudly eats her homemade mustard-and-cheese sandwich while Kid-2 and Kid-1 react with total disgust.
alt: In the kitchen, Kid-3 proudly eats a mustard-and-cheese sandwich while Kid-2 recoils and asks, 'Is that... mustard?' Kid-3 replies, 'And cheese. It’s my recipe!' Kid-1 looks horrified and says, 'Please don’t open a restaurant.' Mom watches with tired amusement while Dad quietly observes.
